diagnostics.message: Recycle Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to the inlet pressure to explain the requested compression duty.
Current residual pattern suggests either insufficient pressure ratio or missing downstream backpressure data, but the root cause is not yet confirmed.

payload.system:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

content.text: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-compressor-evidence-gap-partial-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"summary":"当前围绕选中的 Recycle Compressor（compressor-1）生成候选编辑提案。诊断指出出口压力目标（235 kPa）与进口压力（220 kPa）之间的压比过小（约 1.07），不足以解释所需的压缩负荷；同时根因尚未确认——可能是压力目标设置不当，也可能是缺少下游背压数据。由于根因未完全确认（COMPRESSOR_ROOT_CAUSE_UNCONFIRMED），本提案仅给出局部参数占位修正，状态标记为 partial，需人工审查后再决定是否采纳。","issues":[{"description":"compressor-1 出口压力目标 235 kPa 与进口 220 kPa 仅差 15 kPa（压比 ≈ 1.07），求解器认为该压比不足以匹配所需压缩负荷，导致收敛残差偏高。","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"description":"诊断 COMPRESSOR_ROOT_CAUSE_UNCONFIRMED 表明残差模式可能源于压比不足或下游背压数据缺失，根因尚未锁定，因此任何修正都应视为试探性占位。","citations":["diag-2","snapshot-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"提高 Compressor 出口压力目标至合理压比范围（占位值）","target":{"type":"unit","id":"compressor-1"},"rationale":"将 outlet_pressure_target_kpa 从 235 提升至 440（压比 ≈ 2.0），使压缩机工作在更典型的压比区间，有助于消除 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE 错误并改善求解收敛。440 kPa 仅为占位建议值，实际值应根据下游工艺背压需求确认后再最终确定。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"path":"units[compressor-1].config.outlet_pressure_target_kpa","old_value":235,"new_value_placeholder":440,"placeholder_note":"占位值，基于典型压比 2.0 估算；请根据下游实际背压需求调整"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Compressed Product 流股补充出口压力与温度规格占位","target":{"type":"stream","id":"product-3"},"rationale":"product-3 当前缺少压力与温度规格，这可能是诊断所提到的"缺少下游背压数据"的直接体现。补充占位规格后，求解器可获得出口边界条件，有助于确认根因并改善收敛。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":[{"path":"streams[product-3].specs.pressure_kpa","placeholder_value":440,"placeholder_note":"应与 compressor-1 出口压力目标一致，待确认后同步更新"},{"path":"streams[product-3].specs.temperature_c","placeholder_value":null,"placeholder_note":"出口温度取决于压比与效率，建议由求解器计算或由用户指定"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"confidence":0.52,"citations_index":{"diag-1":{"type":"diagnostic","code":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE","severity":"error","target_id":"compressor-1"},"diag-2":{"type":"diagnostic","code":"COMPRESSOR_ROOT_CAUSE_UNCONFIRMED","severity":"warning","target_id":"compressor-1"},"flowdoc-unit-1":{"type":"artifact","artifact_name":"flowsheet_document","path":"units[0]","object_id":"compressor-1"},"flowdoc-stream-1":{"type":"artifact","artifact_name":"flowsheet_document","path":"streams[0]","object_id":"feed-3"},"flowdoc-stream-2":{"type":"artifact","artifact_name":"flowsheet_document","path":"streams[1]","object_id":"product-3"},"snapshot-1":{"type":"snapshot","solver_status":"partial_convergence","residual_norm":0.18,"last_updated":"2026-04-06T18:30:00Z"}}}]}
